operators.label: Absence & Nullity
operators.description: The void, non-existence, null state. The operator of what is not, what has been removed, or what has not yet come into being.

operators.label: Designation
operators.description: Naming, metadata definition, labeling. The operator that assigns meaning by pointing at something and saying what it is.

operators.label: Instantiation
operators.description: Creation, bringing into existence. The operator that makes something real — from abstract type to concrete instance.

operators.label: Segmentation
operators.description: Splitting, dividing, partitioning. The operator that creates boundaries and separates wholes into parts.

operators.label: Connection
operators.description: Relating, joining, linking. The operator that creates relationships between separate entities.

operators.label: Synthesis
operators.description: Merging, combining, unifying. The operator that resolves multiplicity into unity.

operators.label: Alternation
operators.description: Frame-switching, changing perspective. The operator that shifts between different views or states.

operators.label: Superposition
operators.description: Holding contradictions simultaneously. The operator that maintains multiple incompatible states at once.

operators.label: Recursion
operators.description: Re-centering, self-reference, looping back. The operator that applies the system to itself.
